query: When is hiring a decorator most worth it?
direct_answer: DIY is best when the setup is simple, time is flexible, and visual polish is not the main priority. Hiring a decorator makes more sense when the event needs to feel cleaner, stronger, and ready without you spending the day setting it up.
best_for: This page is for buyers who are still deciding whether to handle the decor themselves or pay for help.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
